description: Controlled vocabulary. Use exactly one of the listed niche strings and one of the listed abundance ordering patterns when answering.

niche_glossary.developing_neuronal_niche: spatial region where Neuronal and Proliferating cells co-localize, marking active in-organoid neurogenesis
niche_glossary.mesenchymal_niche: spatial region enriched for Mesenchyme cells (COL1A2+, DCN+); a normal brain-organoid population
niche_glossary.radial_glial_niche: spatial region enriched for Radial Glia (SOX2+, NES+); a normal brain-organoid population
niche_glossary.neuroepithelial_off_target_niche: spatial region dominated by Neuroepithelia (EPCAM+, CDH1+); off-target lineage
niche_glossary.neural_crest_off_target_niche: spatial region dominated by Neural Crest cells (SOX10+, FOXD3+); off-target lineage
niche_glossary.retinal_off_target_niche: spatial region dominated by retinal progenitors (SIX6+); off-target lineage
niche_glossary.microglial_off_target_niche: spatial region dominated by microglia (AIF1+, C1QC+); off-target lineage
niche_glossary.endothelial_off_target_niche: spatial region dominated by endothelial cells (PECAM1+); off-target lineage
niche_glossary.proliferating_niche: region dominated by MKI67+ proliferating cells without dominant lineage commitment
niche_glossary.neurogenic_zone: candidate synonym for developing_neuronal_niche; pick this only if your decomposition resolves a region distinct from developing_neuronal_niche
niche_glossary.astroglial_niche: region dominated by mature astroglia (GFAP+, AQP4+)
niche_glossary.ventricular_zone: innermost developmental layer where Radial Glia line a fluid-filled ventricle
niche_glossary.subventricular_zone: intermediate progenitor layer adjacent to the ventricular zone
niche_glossary.perivascular_niche: region adjacent to blood vessels supporting stem-cell residency
niche_glossary.choroid_plexus_niche: region of CSF-producing transthyretin-positive epithelial cells
niche_glossary.ependymal_niche: region of ciliated ependymal cells lining ventricles
niche_glossary.GFAP_positive_astrocyte_niche: astrocyte-rich region defined by GFAP positivity
niche_glossary.OPC_like_niche: GBM cell-state niche resembling oligodendrocyte progenitors (Neftel taxonomy)
niche_glossary.NPC_like_niche: GBM cell-state niche resembling neural progenitor cells
niche_glossary.MES_like_niche: GBM cell-state niche resembling mesenchymal tumor cells
niche_glossary.hypoxic_core_niche: oxygen-deprived tumor center marked by HIF1A signaling
niche_glossary.perinecrotic_niche: region surrounding necrotic tumor cores; often pseudopalisading
niche_glossary.oligodendroglial_niche: region dominated by mature oligodendrocytes (MBP+, MAG+)
niche_glossary.neuronal_niche: generic term: any region enriched for Neuronal cells without specifying proliferation context
niche_glossary.neural_niche: generic term: any region enriched for cells of the broad neural lineage
niche_glossary.neuroepithelial_niche: region dominated by Neuroepithelia framed as a normal lineage (no off-target qualifier)
niche_glossary.off_target_niche: generic catch-all for any region dominated by off-target lineages
niche_glossary.mature_neuron_niche: region dominated by post-mitotic neurons (MAP2+, NEUN+)
niche_glossary.cortical_plate_niche: developmental cortical layer of newborn migrating neurons
niche_glossary.neural_progenitor_niche: broad term for any region enriched for neural progenitor cells
niche_glossary.mesenchymal_off_target_niche: mesenchyme framed as off-target rather than as a normal brain-organoid population
niche_glossary.hepatocyte_niche: region dominated by hepatocytes (liver parenchymal cells); not expected in brain organoids
niche_glossary.alveolar_niche: lung alveolar epithelial region; not expected in brain organoids
niche_glossary.hematopoietic_stem_niche: bone-marrow HSC niche; not expected in brain organoids
niche_glossary.cardiac_myocyte_niche: cardiac muscle region; not expected in brain organoids
niche_glossary.intestinal_crypt_niche: intestinal stem-cell crypt region; not expected in brain organoids
niche_glossary.pancreatic_islet_niche: pancreatic endocrine islet; not expected in brain organoids
niche_glossary.retinal_pigment_epithelium_niche: pigmented retinal epithelial monolayer; not expected as a developmental niche in cortical organoids

abundance_ordering_notation: '>' means strictly greater abundance; '~' means within 5 percentage points (treat as a tie). Use exactly one of the 14 listed patterns.
